settings.heading: Built by Collectors, for Collectors
settings.text: We started as a group of friends who were tired of overpriced, unreliable TCG shops. So we built our own. Every product is sourced directly from authorized distributors, stored properly, and shipped fast. We're collectors ourselves — and we treat your orders the way we'd want ours treated.

settings.title: Passion-Driven
settings.text: We're collectors first, sellers second. We know what matters.

settings.title: 100% Authentic
settings.text: Every product sourced directly from authorized distributors.

settings.title: Lightning Fast
settings.text: Same-day shipping on orders placed before 2 PM EST.

settings.heading: Join the Community
settings.subheading: Get notified about new drops, restocks, and exclusive deals.
